challenge.title: Korak 65
challenge.description:
Izraz if koji proverava da li poziv metode solver() iz objekta gameboard vraća True.

Zatim, dodaj poziv print() unutar tela if prosleđujući sledeći f-string: f'Solved puzzle:\n{gameboard}'.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Morate kreirati izraz koji proverava da li poziv metode solver() od objekta gameboard vraća True za if.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
conditions = ["gameboard.solver()", "gameboard.solver() == True", "True == gameboard.solver()"]
node = _Node(_code).find_function("solve_sudoku").find_ifs()[0].find_conditions()[0]
any(node.is_equivalent(condition) for condition in conditions)`)) })

tests.text: Treba da odštampate f'Solved puzzle:\n{gameboard}' unutar novog tela if.

challengeFiles.name: main
